title: Test Implement Verdict-First Review/Test Result Handling

handoff_summary.completed: Updated `tests/test_orchestrator.py` to cover the approved-review path where `remaining` says "No findings discovered in this review pass." while `verdict="approved"`, ensuring the scheduler completes the bead, preserves structured verdict metadata, and skips compat fallback warnings. Ran targeted validation with `python -m unittest` for the review/test verdict-first and legacy compat scenarios; all selected tests passed.
handoff_summary.risks: `pytest` is not installed in this environment, so validation used the repository's unittest entrypoint instead. Shared-risk areas in `src/codex_orchestrator/scheduler.py` and existing compat-mode behavior were exercised but not modified by this tester bead.
handoff_summary.next_action: Proceed with downstream review or integration using the strengthened verdict-first regression coverage.
handoff_summary.conflict_risks: Downstream agents should not remove `REVIEW_TEST_VERDICT_COMPAT_MODE` or the compat warning assertions unless they are intentionally completing the prompt/runtime migration together. The new test anchors the approved-verdict behavior against free-form `remaining` text and should be preserved if scheduler finalize logic is refactored.

conflict_risks: Downstream agents should not remove `REVIEW_TEST_VERDICT_COMPAT_MODE` or the compat warning assertions unless they are intentionally completing the prompt/runtime migration together. execution_history.summary: Deferred due to file-scope conflict with active bead B0056-docs

Added the missing regression test for verdict-approved review output with the exact "No findings discovered" phrasing and validated the verdict-first/compatibility paths with targeted unittest coverage.

guardrails.template_text:
# Tester Guardrails

Primary responsibility: Add or update automated tests, run validation, and report defects or missing coverage.

Allowed actions:
- Write or update tests relevant to the assigned bead.
- Run targeted checks and summarize failures clearly.
- Make minimal test-enablement fixes only when strictly necessary to execute or stabilize the tests.

Disallowed actions:
- Implement feature logic beyond minimal test-enablement work.
- Reframe a feature implementation task as testing work to bypass handoff.
- Perform review signoff or broad documentation rewrites.

Expected outputs:
- Completed or blocked JSON describing test coverage, validation status, and follow-up needs.
- Precise defect or coverage notes when the bead cannot be completed within tester scope.
